dialogos.texto_en: Hiya ladies!\nHave you found anything good?
Oh, it's Uesugi-san.
Not yet.\nHow about you, big bro?
Me neither.\nPicking the perfect souvenir is quite difficult, isn't it?
Oh, look over here!\nThis shop has lots of T-shirts!
Wow, you're right.\nIt's packed with T-shirts right from the storefront.
Amazing...\nThey seem to have every pattern and color.
Oh, that's cute.\nIt has a shisa on it.
Oh, that one?\nIt looks like they've altered it quite a bit,\nmaking it look like a mascot character.
Do you like it, Raiha-chan? Let's buy it, then!
Huh?
Please leave the payment to me!
Um, it's okay, Yotsuba.\nIt's cute, but I don't really want it that much.
Oh, really?\nThen please tell me if you see something else you like.
Hmm, let's see...
Oh, what's that? It's cute, but is that a snake?
That's definitely a spotted garden eel.\nIt's a creature that sticks its head out while living in the sand.
But they don't grow like vegetables in the ground.
They don't, but let's buy it anyway!
That bird T-shirt looks good too.\nWhat kind of bird is it?
I don't know, but let's buy it!
It looks like a Yanbaru rail.
They even have a banana T-shirt.\nI wonder if bananas are famous in Okinawa?
Okinawan bananas are rare.
Let's buy it! Guys, come on!
There's even such a thing as a goya T-shirt, huh!\nIt might be a little strange wearing it outside of Okinawa.
We've got to buy it!
*sigh*\nI've been ignoring you for a while,\nbut how many T-shirts do you plan to buy here, Yotsuba?
But if Raiha-chan likes them,\nI'd like to buy them for her.
Well, I'm happy, but that's not necessary.\nI appreciate the gesture though.
Is that so? You don't have to hold back, you know?\nI'll buy everything you want!
Hey...
Calm down a bit. Raiha seems to be in trouble.
Wha!
Raiha-chan... Did I cause you trouble?
Well, a little bit, I guess.\nBut I'm grateful for your compassion.
Ooohh... I see...\nI'm sorry for getting carried away without permission.
She doesn't really need clothes that much.
Well come on, you keep saying that, but that's why\nyou'll always look very boring, Uesugi-san.
Wha?!
You tell him, sister!
R-Raiha...\nWeren't you on my side?
I am on your side, but I think you should\npay more attention to fashion, big bro. After all,\nIchika-san is very fashionable.
Ugh...
Now listen, Uesugi-san. No matter how many\nclothes you have, you won't be in trouble for having them.\nCombining different clothes is the key!
W-well, even if that's true,\nhow do you wear a goya or an eel T-shirt?
That's difficult!
Hey! Don't give up there!
You can't wear these clothes all year long, ya know.\nT-shirts with bananas or goya\nare clearly for people with a refined taste right?
Ooh...\nThat's not true, right, Raiha-chan?
Ahaha...\nSorry, Yotsuba-san.\nIt's true that it might be a little embarrassing.
Oh NO!!
It's fun looking at them in the store,\nbut imagining myself wearing them...\nnot so much.
Now that you mention it, you're right...\nI might have gotten a little carried away.
You were totally in tourist mode.
But, Uesugi-san, you were the most hyped up\nwhen we arrived in Okinawa, weren't you?
Th-that was different. This is a whole separate matter!
That was fun!\nThere were so many interesting T-shirts.
Um, Raiha-chan?\nCan I at least give you one T-shirt as a gift,\nplease?
Huh?!
I can't control myself anymore!\nI have to buy you something Raiha-chan!
Well, you'll have to endure that...
Okay, then...
I'm still growing, you know. Even if I receive a gift,\nI'll probably outgrow it soon, and it'll slumber in my wardrobe.
Th-that's...!\nIt would be unforgivable\nif my gift made you sad, Raiha-chan!
I'm really greatful for your effort.\nThank you, Yotsuba-san.
Ha-wa-waah!\nYou're such a good girl, Raiha-chan,\ntoo good!
Then, I'll buy you one when you grow up!\nI promise! I will NEVER forget!
What's with that promise...?
